title: Ray Caster
description: Ray Caster - get best wands , beast bosses and get op armour.
body:
![RAY CASTER](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b437d72425aea8642b1a89c08a7c8051085fe83.jpeg)
# 🪄 Raycaster: Tiered Energy Wands

Raycaster introduces a powerful new way to handle combat and exploration. Craft, upgrade, and enchant high-tech energy wands that fire concentrated beams of power. Whether you're clearing out a cave or defending your base, the Raycaster wands provide a satisfying, long-range alternative to traditional weaponry.

### ⚔️ Wand Tiers & Statistics

| Tier | Durability | Max Range | Max Damage | Special Features |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Basic Beam Stick** | **100** | 50 Blocks | 6.0 ❤️ | Crafted with BlazeRod & EchoShard. Lightweight. |
| **Diamond Beam Stick** | **500** | 80 Blocks | 10.0 ❤️ | Longest range. Precision firing. |
| **Netherite Beam Stick** | **2,031** | 50 Blocks | 25.0 ❤️ | Fireproof. Massive damage. Slows user while charging. |

### 🧬 Upgrade Progression

| Result | Input A | Input B | Station |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Basic Stick** | Lightning Rod | Copper Ingots | Crafting Table |
| **Diamond Stick** | Basic Stick | Diamonds | Crafting Table |
| **Netherite Stick** | Diamond Stick | Netherite Ingot | Smithing Table |


![thank you](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf132243a768ceb85384c2ff232231c36afbd23e.jpeg)
